SND · component library

The UI toolkit

Every graphic SND draws — knobs, faders, meters, LEDs, tactile keys, a keyboard, an XY pad, a step grid — rendered here from the same geometry as snd::ui::paint. Live, animated, and re-themable: pick an accent and the whole rack follows.

Accent

Knobs

paint::drawKnob · KnobStyle

Two styles. Ring — a value arc that sweeps 270° from 7 o'clock, with a bipolar variant that grows from centre. Davies — a moulded cap with tick ring and pointer. Values sweep live below.

Ring
Ring · bipolar
Davies
disabled

Fader

paint::drawFader

Channel fader — centre rail, accent fill below the cap, cap brightens when grabbed. Rides a slow automation curve here.

−6 dB
auto
auto
hot

Toggle

paint::drawToggle

Sliding switch; the track lerps to the accent as the nub travels. Auto-toggling on a timer.

animated
on
off

Buttons

paint::drawButton

Flat control button across its states — the accent underline marks the selected one.

default
hover
active
selected
disabled

Tactile key

paint::drawTactileIconButton

The hardware key: light-grey raised, recesses to a dark inset on press with the glyph lit in the accent. Press one.

play
stop
tune
pressed
lucide

LED

paint::drawLed

Status lamp with a soft bloom when lit. Blinking, steady, and off.

activity
on
off

Meter

paint::drawMeter

Peak meter with the classic green / amber / red hardware zones and a peak-hold line. Vertical and horizontal, running live program material.

L
R
bus · horizontal

Badge & section header

paint::drawBadge · drawSectionHeader

Small labels: a tinted pill and a dim caption with a trailing rule.

bob VST3 MIDI

List item

paint::drawListItem

Selectable row — the accent rail and tint mark the current selection.

Kick 909
Snare — rimshot
Hat closed
Clap

Pattern grid

paint::drawPatternGrid

Step sequencer grid — lit cells in the accent, a checkered off-state on the beat, and a playhead sweeping the columns.

XY pad

paint::drawXYPad

Two-axis control with a cross-hair and a lit handle, tracing a slow path.

Keyboard

paint::drawKeyboard

Playable range — white and black keys light in the accent as notes arrive. A little phrase plays across it.

Icons

Material · Apache-2.0  /  Lucide · ISC

The bundled icon fonts — 2,234 Material and 1,962 Lucide, addressed by ICON_MD_* / ICON_LC_*. A sample of each; tap one to see the press.

Material
Lucide
Rendered from the SND toolkit — controls trace snd::ui::paint geometry, icons come from third_party/fonts. In the app these draw once per changed frame through the shared paint layer, so immediate-mode and retained-mode widgets stay pixel-identical.
